title: Bausch + Lomb ULTRA
description: These monthly contact lenses feature MoistureSeal technology, providing all-day comfort and clear vision, even in dry environments.

title: Bausch + Lomb PureVision2
description: These silicone hydrogel lenses offer excellent comfort and sharp, clear vision, ideal for people with busy lifestyles, available in both monthly and daily wear options.

title: Bausch + Lomb Biotrue ONEday
description: These daily disposable lenses are designed to mimic the natural moisture of your eyes, providing exceptional comfort and hydration throughout the day.

title: Bausch + Lomb SofLens 38
description: A popular choice for those seeking value and comfort, these monthly lenses offer clear vision and high moisture retention for all-day wear.

title: Bausch + Lomb SofLens Toric
description: Designed for those with astigmatism, these toric lenses offer stable vision and comfort throughout the day with a two-week replacement schedule.

title: Bausch + Lomb Lacelle Color
description: These colored contact lenses offer a natural look with vivid colors while maintaining comfort and breathability, available for both cosmetic and vision-correcting needs.
